summary: Surah Qaf emphasizes the reality of resurrection, the nearness of Allah to His creation, and the accountability of every soul. It recounts the destruction of earlier nations who denied the truth and highlights the recording of every word and deed by angels. The surah describes scenes from the Day of Judgment, the fate of the righteous and the wicked, and urges patience, remembrance, and reflection on Allah’s creation.
